# Generative AI metrics

**Status**: [Development][DocumentStatus]

Metric snippets select from `.registry.metrics` by `name`. Weaver renders the
metric descriptor table (instrument, unit, entity associations) followed by the
attribute table. Each block is rewritten in place between its
`<!-- weaver ... -->` and `<!-- endweaver -->` markers.

## Token usage

<!-- weaver .registry.metrics[] | select(.name == "gen_ai.client.token.usage") -->
<!-- NOTE: THIS TEXT IS AUTOGENERATED. DO NOT EDIT BY HAND. -->
<!-- see test/fixtures/templates/registry/markdown/snippet.md.j2 -->
<!-- prettier-ignore-start -->

| Name | Instrument Type | Unit (UCUM) | Description | Stability | Entity Associations |
| -------- | --------------- | ----------- | -------------- | --------- | ------ |
| `gen_ai.client.token.usage` | Histogram | `{token}` | Number of input and output tokens used. | ![Development](https://img.shields.io/badge/-development-blue) | `gen_ai.agent` |

**Attributes:**

| Key | Stability | [Requirement Level](https://opentelemetry.io/docs/specs/semconv/general/attribute-requirement-level/) | Value Type | Description | Example Values |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| [`gen_ai.operation.name`](registry/attributes/gen-ai.md) | ![Development](https://img.shields.io/badge/-development-blue) | `Required` | string | The name of the operation being performed. | |
| [`gen_ai.provider.name`](registry/attributes/gen-ai.md) | ![Development](https://img.shields.io/badge/-development-blue) | `Required` | string | The Generative AI provider as identified by the client or server instrumentation. | `openai`; `anthropic` |
| [`gen_ai.token.type`](registry/attributes/gen-ai.md) | ![Development](https://img.shields.io/badge/-development-blue) | `Required` | string | The type of token being counted. | `input`; `output` |
| [`gen_ai.request.model`](registry/attributes/gen-ai.md) | ![Development](https://img.shields.io/badge/-development-blue) | `Recommended` | string | The name of the GenAI model a request is being made to. | `gpt-4` |
| [`gen_ai.response.model`](registry/attributes/gen-ai.md) | ![Development](https://img.shields.io/badge/-development-blue) | `Recommended` | string | The name of the model that generated the response. | `gpt-4-0613` |

---

`gen_ai.provider.name` has the following list of well-known values. If one of them applies, then the respective value MUST be used; otherwise, a custom value MAY be used.

| Value | Description | Stability |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `anthropic` | [Anthropic](https://www.anthropic.com/) | ![Development](https://img.shields.io/badge/-development-blue) |
| `openai` | [OpenAI](https://openai.com/) | ![Development](https://img.shields.io/badge/-development-blue) |

---

`gen_ai.token.type` has the following list of well-known values. If one of them applies, then the respective value MUST be used; otherwise, a custom value MAY be used.

| Value | Description | Stability |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `input` | Input tokens (prompt, input, etc.). | ![Development](https://img.shields.io/badge/-development-blue) |
| `output` | Output tokens (completion, response, etc.). | ![Development](https://img.shields.io/badge/-development-blue) |

<!-- prettier-ignore-end -->
<!-- END AUTOGENERATED TEXT -->
<!-- endweaver -->

## Operation duration

<!-- weaver .registry.metrics[] | select(.name == "gen_ai.client.operation.duration") -->
<!-- NOTE: THIS TEXT IS AUTOGENERATED. DO NOT EDIT BY HAND. -->
<!-- see test/fixtures/templates/registry/markdown/snippet.md.j2 -->
<!-- prettier-ignore-start -->

| Name | Instrument Type | Unit (UCUM) | Description | Stability | Entity Associations |
| -------- | --------------- | ----------- | -------------- | --------- | ------ |
| `gen_ai.client.operation.duration` | Histogram | `s` | GenAI operation duration. | ![Development](https://img.shields.io/badge/-development-blue) | |

**Attributes:**

| Key | Stability | [Requirement Level](https://opentelemetry.io/docs/specs/semconv/general/attribute-requirement-level/) | Value Type | Description | Example Values |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| [`gen_ai.operation.name`](registry/attributes/gen-ai.md) | ![Development](https://img.shields.io/badge/-development-blue) | `Required` | string | The name of the operation being performed. | |
| [`gen_ai.provider.name`](registry/attributes/gen-ai.md) | ![Development](https://img.shields.io/badge/-development-blue) | `Required` | string | The Generative AI provider as identified by the client or server instrumentation. | `openai`; `anthropic` |
| [`error.type`](registry/attributes/error.md) | ![Stable](https://img.shields.io/badge/-stable-lightgreen) | `Conditionally Required` If the operation ended in an error. | string | Describes a class of error the operation ended with. | `timeout`; `java.net.UnknownHostException`; `500` |
| [`gen_ai.request.model`](registry/attributes/gen-ai.md) | ![Development](https://img.shields.io/badge/-development-blue) | `Recommended` | string | The name of the GenAI model a request is being made to. | `gpt-4` |
| [`gen_ai.response.model`](registry/attributes/gen-ai.md) | ![Development](https://img.shields.io/badge/-development-blue) | `Recommended` | string | The name of the model that generated the response. | `gpt-4-0613` |

---

`error.type` has the following list of well-known values. If one of them applies, then the respective value MUST be used; otherwise, a custom value MAY be used.

| Value | Description | Stability |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `_OTHER` | A fallback error value to be used when the instrumentation doesn't define a custom value. | ![Stable](https://img.shields.io/badge/-stable-lightgreen) |

---

`gen_ai.provider.name` has the following list of well-known values. If one of them applies, then the respective value MUST be used; otherwise, a custom value MAY be used.

| Value | Description | Stability |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `anthropic` | [Anthropic](https://www.anthropic.com/) | ![Development](https://img.shields.io/badge/-development-blue) |
| `openai` | [OpenAI](https://openai.com/) | ![Development](https://img.shields.io/badge/-development-blue) |

<!-- prettier-ignore-end -->
<!-- END AUTOGENERATED TEXT -->
<!-- endweaver -->

## OpenAI token usage

Metric refinements are addressed by `id` under `.refinements.metrics`.

<!-- weaver .refinements.metrics[] | select(.id == "openai.client.token.usage") -->
<!-- NOTE: THIS TEXT IS AUTOGENERATED. DO NOT EDIT BY HAND. -->
<!-- see test/fixtures/templates/registry/markdown/snippet.md.j2 -->
<!-- prettier-ignore-start -->

| Name | Instrument Type | Unit (UCUM) | Description | Stability | Entity Associations |
| -------- | --------------- | ----------- | -------------- | --------- | ------ |
| `gen_ai.client.token.usage` | Histogram | `{token}` | OpenAI-specific refinement of the token usage metric. | ![Development](https://img.shields.io/badge/-development-blue) | |

**Attributes:**

| Key | Stability | [Requirement Level](https://opentelemetry.io/docs/specs/semconv/general/attribute-requirement-level/) | Value Type | Description | Example Values |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| [`gen_ai.operation.name`](registry/attributes/gen-ai.md) | ![Development](https://img.shields.io/badge/-development-blue) | `Required` | string | The name of the operation being performed. | |
| [`gen_ai.provider.name`](registry/attributes/gen-ai.md) | ![Development](https://img.shields.io/badge/-development-blue) | `Required` | string | The Generative AI provider as identified by the client or server instrumentation. | `openai`; `anthropic` |
| [`gen_ai.request.model`](registry/attributes/gen-ai.md) | ![Development](https://img.shields.io/badge/-development-blue) | `Required` | string | The name of the GenAI model a request is being made to. | `gpt-4` |
| [`gen_ai.token.type`](registry/attributes/gen-ai.md) | ![Development](https://img.shields.io/badge/-development-blue) | `Required` | string | The type of token being counted. | `input`; `output` |
| [`gen_ai.response.model`](registry/attributes/gen-ai.md) | ![Development](https://img.shields.io/badge/-development-blue) | `Recommended` | string | The name of the model that generated the response. | `gpt-4-0613` |

---

`gen_ai.provider.name` has the following list of well-known values. If one of them applies, then the respective value MUST be used; otherwise, a custom value MAY be used.

| Value | Description | Stability |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `anthropic` | [Anthropic](https://www.anthropic.com/) | ![Development](https://img.shields.io/badge/-development-blue) |
| `openai` | [OpenAI](https://openai.com/) | ![Development](https://img.shields.io/badge/-development-blue) |

---

`gen_ai.token.type` has the following list of well-known values. If one of them applies, then the respective value MUST be used; otherwise, a custom value MAY be used.

| Value | Description | Stability |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `input` | Input tokens (prompt, input, etc.). | ![Development](https://img.shields.io/badge/-development-blue) |
| `output` | Output tokens (completion, response, etc.). | ![Development](https://img.shields.io/badge/-development-blue) |

<!-- prettier-ignore-end -->
